name: Degraded Operations Fallback
description: Universal fallback protocol when other protocols fail or prerequisites cannot be met. Agents operate on minimal assumptions: limited comms, limited authority, limited resources. Prioritizes life safety above all else.

trigger_conditions.note: This is the protocol of last resort

steps.action: Determine what IS working: list available comms, agents, resources, authority tokens
Broadcast SOS beacon on ALL available channels with hub status summary
steps.note: Even Morse beacon — anything that gets signal out

steps.action: Preserve life: if agents have local authority, prioritize immediate life-safety actions over coordination
steps.note: ICS principle: life safety > incident stabilization > property conservation

steps.action: Cache all local state and decisions. When connectivity restores, SYNC everything.
Continuously attempt to reach higher authority. Retry every 60 seconds.
Log everything: timestamps, decisions, justifications. This becomes the after-action record.
